projectDescription: Enterprise-grade distributed network security system protecting critical infrastructure from DDoS and ransomware attacks
keyFeatures: eBPF/XDP high-performance packet capture with 512-byte payload extraction
Multi-layer ransomware detection with entropy analysis and pattern matching
Embedded RandomForest ML models with 97.6% accuracy on CTU-13 dataset
ChaCha20-Poly1305 authenticated encryption with LZ4 compression
Autonomous kernel-level blocking via IPSet/IPTables integration
RAG-based natural language intelligence with TinyLlama and FAISS
Production-validated: 36K events stress tested, 17-hour stability runs
publicApiSurface: sniffer-ebpf - Network traffic capture and feature extraction service
ml-detector - Machine learning threat detection service
firewall-acl-agent - Dynamic firewall rule management service
etcd-server - Distributed configuration and coordination service
rag-ingester - Log parsing and vector embedding service
rag - Natural language query interface for forensic analysis
synthetic_ml_output_injector - Testing tool for ML detector output simulation
